title: Vr+
description: Vivecraft+ is just a modpack with vivecraft and a few performance mods. If theres any problems, contact me at Defanoux.
body:
This modpack adds features that allow you to play in VR. Some other features add Iris (shaders), voice chat, randomized names for villagers, animations for eating, culling for better performance, and a mod menu. 

You should download this project if you were trying to find a way to play in VR with better performance or just a few mod add-ons that can be added onto by yourself with more mods like custom mobs or swords. You would also want to download this if your friends have VR but you feel left out, with Vivecraft your able to see the animations of other people when they wave their arms around while mining. 

Other info: Need help? Contact Defanoux (discord). Also to test out your computer for VR rendering, go and get this free VR testing service made by steam. (https://store.steampowered.com/app/323910/SteamVR_Performance_Test/)
